The detector was positioned inside a main shield
composed of Fe, Pb, Cu, Li2CO3, and paraffin.
There was a secondary shield of Fe and W between main

- Intensity attenuation of neutrons in sample (14.3)
- Absorption of gamma rays in sample (27.8)
- Intensity attenuation of neutrons in target substrate
- Solid-angle correction due to point approximation
